subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Hadith هل رأیت رجلاً (Commentary on the Tradition "Dost thou see a man")
subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who, in the essence of His Being, is exalted above all description of contingent things and Who, in the reality of His Nature, is sanctified from every attribute [3.5s]... ...O thou who hast turned thy face towards the court of eternity, and art even as a brand afire with the flames of the Burning Bush! Concerning thy question about the term “angels”… And now concerning thy question about the 'Jinn', know thou that God - exalted be He - hath created man from four elements: fire, air, water and earth
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لمن تعالی بجوهر ذاته عن وصف الممکنات و تقدس بساذج حقیقته من نعت
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @the human soul, @independent investigation of truth; reality, @knowledge; recognition of God
